data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making processes for the user.
data.technical_spec: Limits choices in navigation menus and interface elements.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Ensures interfaces are optimized for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Designs large clickable areas for frequent tasks like 'Like' or 'Comment.'

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Considers cognitive limitations in user interaction design.
data.technical_spec: Groups content into manageable chunks (e.g., stories and reels).

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leverages user familiarity by aligning with web conventions.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design elements with the broader social media ecosystem.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Creates visually appealing and understandable interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Use of proximity, similarity, and continuity in design.
